description: CompositionGrey, round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with an inner rib around the neck, half sleeved and has an appliquéd design on the chestFittingMuscle Wash careHand wash separately in in cold waterUse mild detergentDo not bleachAvoid soakingDo not dry in direct sunlightDo not iron directly on print/embroideryBring out the rugged side of you with this tee from basics. The distressed colour with the appliquéd patch work on the chest adds to the ruggedness of your personality. A perfect all-season wear with its short sleeves and made of pure cotton, pair this basics t-shirt with torn jeans and chappals to give your look an edgy shot.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
